full_text:
Xiahou Chong 夏侯充
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiahou Chong (夏侯充). Eldest son of Xiahou Dun, he inherited his father’s ranks. Xiahou Chong was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
